title: mentha × villosa var. amaurophylla
intro: Mentha × villosa var. amaurophylla, also known as Woolly Mint, is a variety of the mint plant that has a unique characteristic of having soft, woolly leaves. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily derived from its essential oils, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Woolly Mint include alleviating digestive issues, relieving headaches and nausea, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as congestion and coughs. Woolly Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
